content.text: Overview and data management for employee.
Manage complaint records and open the create dialog when new data is needed.
Manage when records and open the create dialog when new data is needed.
Manage clear records and open the create dialog when new data is needed.
Manage easily records and open the create dialog when new data is needed.
Manage hour records and open the create dialog when new data is needed.

specs.name: GetEmployeeDetails
specs.description: Retrieves and validates employee's personal information for display/editing (US47).

specs.name: SubmitComplaint
specs.description: Creates a new complaint record and sets initial status (US18, US19).

specs.name: ViewAllComplaints
specs.description: Retrieves list of complaints based on user role (US21, US22).

specs.name: UpdateComplaintStatus
specs.description: Allows office staff to update the status and resolution notes of a complaint (US23).

specs.name: SendNotification
specs.description: Handles sending notifications (email/app) for status changes (US06, US12, US26).

specs.name: CalculateSalaryStatement
specs.description: Automates the calculation of salary statements based on work hours and payment frequency (US01, US15, US16).

specs.name: SubmitSchedule
specs.description: Submits and finalizes the schedule for approval (US14).
steps: Check if all required fields are filled.
